user.title: Octopus Nero — Cafe Nero Auto-Claim
user.description: Enter your Octopus Energy API key and account number. You can find your API key at octopus.energy/dashboard/developer-settings.

data_description.api_key: Your Octopus Energy API key (starts with sk_live_)
data_description.account_number: Your account number in the format A-XXXXXXXX

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Octopus Nero
reauth_confirm.description: Your Octopus Energy API key for account {account_number} has expired or been revoked. Enter a new API key to continue.

error.invalid_api_key: Could not authenticate with that API key. Please check it.
error.invalid_account: Account number not found for this API key.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach Octopus Energy. Check your connection.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

abort.already_configured: This Octopus Energy account is already configured.
